summary: Stage 1 Audit Plans (BACF6-07) Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin page and Public client review page working correctly. Full workflow tested: create from job order → update → manager approve → send to client → client accept/request changes.

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> cannot be child of <span>) - cosmetic React dev tool warning, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document (207KB+)
Public client review page shows all plan details including schedule table, team members
Client already accepted the plan - Accept/Request Changes buttons hidden after response
Arabic RTL support working correctly throughout pages
Status badges correctly show draft, pending_manager, manager_approved, pending_client, client_accepted, changes_requested states
Create modal correctly filters for confirmed job orders only
Edit modal shows full plan details with editable team members and schedule entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 1 Audit Plans (BACF6-07) feature is fully functional. All backend endpoints at /api/stage1-audit-plans working. Admin page at /stage1-audit-plans shows stats (total, draft, approved, client accepted), table with plans, create modal with job order selection, and edit modal with full details including team members and schedule table. Public client review page at /stage1-plan-review/:accessToken shows all plan details with Accept/Request Changes buttons (hidden after client response). PDF generation works (207KB+). The existing plan has status 'client_accepted' meaning the client already accepted the audit plan.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/stage1-audit-plans: Create from confirmed job order - WORKING

frontend_components.stage1_audit_plans_page: Admin page at /stage1-audit-plans with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total (1), draft (0), approved (1), client accepted (0)
frontend_components.plans_table: Shows organization, team leader, audit date, status, actions
frontend_components.create_modal: Opens with job order dropdown, filters for confirmed orders only
frontend_components.edit_modal: Shows client contact, audit details, team leader (read-only), team members, schedule table, notes
frontend_components.link_modal: Shows client review link after sending to client
frontend_components.public_review_page: Shows plan details, schedule table, approval info, accept/request changes buttons

workflow_tested.create_flow: Create from confirmed job order - creates with team leader from job order
workflow_tested.update_flow: Update contact info, audit dates, team members, schedule - all saved correctly
workflow_tested.manager_approve: Manager approves plan → Status changes to manager_approved
workflow_tested.send_to_client: Admin sends review link → Status changes to pending_client
workflow_tested.client_accept: Client accepts via public link → Status changes to client_accepted
workflow_tested.client_request_changes: Client can request changes with reason → Status changes to changes_requested

pdf_content_verified.header: STAGE 1 AUDIT PLAN with BACF6-07 reference
pdf_content_verified.schedule_table: Date/time, process, process owner, clauses, auditor
pdf_content_verified.signatures: Team leader and client acceptance status

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained. Email sending is mocked (logs to console) but doesn't affect functionality.
